conflict_taxonomy.CON_01: Asymmetric False Accusation: Framing/scapegoating where protagonist cannot speak the truth
conflict_taxonomy.CON_02: Intergenerational Blood Feud: Inherited tribal, familial, or factional violence
conflict_taxonomy.CON_03: Institutional & State Decay: Bureaucratic, judicial, or police corruption as primary adversary
conflict_taxonomy.CON_04: Systemic Caste/Class Apartheid: Structural societal barriers, discrimination, segregation
conflict_taxonomy.CON_05: Existential Identity Fracture: Amnesia, imposter syndrome, double lives, hidden ancestry
conflict_taxonomy.CON_06: Terminal Decay / Bodily Betrayal: Degenerative illness, sudden disability, physical regression
conflict_taxonomy.CON_07: The Crippling Debt Trap: Generational debt, mortgage foreclosure, financial ruin
conflict_taxonomy.CON_08: Irreversible Grief Decimation: Post-tragedy trauma arcs where loss has already occurred
conflict_taxonomy.CON_09: The Zero-Sum Moral Choice: High-stakes dilemmas where saving Option A destroys Option B
conflict_taxonomy.CON_10: Taboo / Outlawed Intimacy: Romance violating religious, societal, or age-gap boundaries
conflict_taxonomy.CON_11: The Vigilante Pipeline: Law-abiding citizen pushed past psychological point to extrajudicial retribution
conflict_taxonomy.CON_12: The Deep Cover Double-Cross: Undercover operations, moles, shifting tribal loyalties
conflict_taxonomy.CON_13: The Heist / Tactical Countdown: Asset extraction under tight spatial and temporal boundaries
conflict_taxonomy.CON_14: Supernatural / Mythic Invasion: Cosmic horror, local folklore entities, divine intervention
conflict_taxonomy.CON_15: The Self-Destructive Downward Spiral: Internal character erosion—hubris, substance abuse, collapse
conflict_taxonomy.CON_16: Urban Migration Dislocation: Violent culture shock and economic friction of rural-to-metro
conflict_taxonomy.CON_17: The Parasitic Informant / Betrayal: Internal traitors within close-knit group
conflict_taxonomy.CON_18: Technological / Modernist Dystopia: AI surveillance, cybercrime, scientific hubris
conflict_taxonomy.CON_19: The Custody / Legacy Partition: Parental custody wars, ancestral property splits, succession
conflict_taxonomy.CON_20: The Man vs. Wild Survival Siege: Physiological survival against extreme environments
